key_insight: IGA-ODIL optimizes PINNs by using B-spline basis functions for efficient and robust solution representation.
engineering_relevance: This work enhances computational efficiency in solving complex forward and inverse problems in engineering applications.
method: Combines Optimizing DIscrete Loss (ODIL) with Isogeometric Analysis (IGA) for residual minimization.
Uses sparse structured Jacobians for efficient Gauss-Newton optimization.
Implements robust residual formulations based on weighted Gram operators.
evidence_signal: Numerical experiments show orders-of-magnitude speedups compared to traditional PINNs with maintained accuracy.
watch_item: Further studies may be required to assess scalability to more complex real-world applications.
paper_title: IGA-ODIL: Optimizing DIscretre robust Loss with Isogeometric Analysis to solve forward and inverse problems faster using machine learning tools
